name: Republican Party of New Hampshire
subject: NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester on passing of Rockingham County Treasurer Sandy Buck
body:
PRESS RELEASE

For Immediate Release: August 14, 2017

Contact: Patrick Hynes, 202-321-5310 ( tel:(202)%20321-5310 )

Statement from NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester on the passing of
Rockingham County Treasurer Sandy Buck

Concord, NH – NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester released the
following statement regarding the passing of Rockingham County
Treasurer Sandy Buck:

"We are all saddened to hear of the passing of Rockingham County
Treasurer and dedicated community member Sandy Buck. He has
served his community, county, and state with distinction and his
leadership will be missed."

###

footer image

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com ( dpwillis67@gmail.com )

name: The White House
subject: Meet the Cabinet: Secretary Rick Perry
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=07df5f51762f3115fc7853ef769fff73aee5e7a54bf05b2f459fc9953e649dd312a93a48db4364008d0a65f57ddd7ce8f0b99de414bfb417

Welcome to 1600 Daily's Meet the Cabinet series, where we showcase members of President Trump's Cabinet.

Meet Secretary Rick Perry

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=07df5f51762f311529b9aaf937d81238df46bf12e5eb3d5f88228f36c886baa650458f9546bb6d8ed3140dff1daf472da5033e80359bdc4d

-------------

DOE and VA Team Up to Improve Healthcare for Veterans

The Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) and the Department of Energy (DOE) are partnering to drive technology innovation and transform health care delivery for Veterans with the Million Veterans Program. Secretary Perry has brought in Navy Seal, Morgan Luttrell to help with this effort.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b6187b922c0d9caaa9afb27cab8be1ecee8312c5b8b9bd0d80b32ebe1eca3137d6f22dfb92a251d778efa66af5b93f13bf3b33e02f91484d
Read more

17 National Labs Tackle Scientific Challenges

Secretary Perry has made it abundantly clear that he values the role that the DOE National Labs play in both the science and energy industries. He has already traveled to several labs across the Nation, and is continuing to do so - this week even! A recent podcast on the Labs was even given the
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b6187b922c0d9caa444982c668f47e1d8ed621050b818d9bdecd91b5ec96c0c93e6a6b09ac4096dd5f243edca8d3683d2c2930d01fe2fa06
thumbs up from Bill Gates .

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b6187b922c0d9caac96a197786bd2175f405fd55ffd474c9fb3fd37b7a2fbb75e71ab54f31a4caa1f149c623e69089315f47a34faac2d13f
Read more

ICYMI: The United States Emerges as "Powerful Force" in LNG trade

According to data from the Census Bureau and the U.S. Energy Information Administration, with new pipeline and LNG export capacity coming online soon, the US should close out 2017 as a net exporter of natural gas, a situation that hasn't been seen since 1957.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b6187b922c0d9caa9e366e3da1d1d651cecfd39bc15c662ab06f48d1acf74de0cc0e5d48b2541b085b8a8a2b054fc73d3dd6685653173afd
Read more

Photo of the Day

Secretary Perry test drove a 3D-printed Shelby Cobra, a real world example of additive manufacturing's incredible potential. Printed at the Oak Ridge National Laboratory, the Shelby is a "plug-in-play" lab that allows research and development of integrated components and manufacturing process technologies to be tested in real time. | August 4 (Department of Energy Photo)

Coming Up This Month

Secretary Perry is in Washington State this week touring the Pacific Northwest National Lab and the Hanford Site. He will address the workforces at both facilities and have press availability.

Follow Secretary Perry on

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b6187b922c0d9caa28dbca9601f2060d42096cb4da3898018a556588233998166aeb32a9422481fdc87561429d4da7f0c6f52964ffb00b44
Twitter and
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b6187b922c0d9caa67142f6c114323ccd86dfa0e7a22daceef37d9c60b58bab7a2b84099bbbf68c3e11286fe4f50a08bf218c3e00b4c7e94
Facebook

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b6187b922c0d9caadd3e09f5795c150e0b4ee409aff65541ef659241e97e1a4df716efbcf857f8618cc1c4dc53a285775eea0a3ecd1d3363
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b6187b922c0d9caa2dca198a208c74cc36f6618e8b2022d1ab458a3a336ad3d1d8a94e60d6217b7ea6e7e99d87630912f176af491ffb9140
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4868c704445b709717fb905f30cc9b5be2841e43a4e01fc5aeea18657ed65e3a0485327a98407dc9302a2bf001f27c84a

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Charlottesville
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek,

The events that took place in Charlottesville this weekend have left me heartbroken. White supremacists came to our state to wage a campaign of hate. And now three Virginians -- Heather Heyer and state troopers Pilot Lt. H. Jay Cullen and Trooper-Pilot Berke M.M. Bates -- are dead.

**We are better than this. We are stronger than this.** Virginia and America will prevail against those who use racism and violence to intimidate and injure our communities. Our Commonwealth is still grappling with the deep scars of our past -- but we know that the only path forward is the one that leads toward inclusion, equality, liberty, and an end to fear.

I'm encouraged that leaders across the political spectrum have denounced the hate that came to Virginia. However, more is needed. We must follow the words with action so that every citizen is able to feel safe. We must also recognize that divisive rhetoric, whether on the campaign trail, in the halls of our government, or in prominent corners of the internet, contributes to a climate where individuals who espouse hate feel emboldened -- so we must speak out against it whenever we hear it.

I will stand with the Charlottesville community in every step as we recover from the terrible events of this weekend. Let us pull together and show that we will firmly oppose hate wherever it shows its face and defeat it.

Thank you,

Tim
---
| Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=FOs%2Fg92eJDvtSLIz6SzzKxOhIyrwcIHW).
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Tom Perez
subject: Derek, we're holding Sen. Heller accountable - take a look
body:
We have a new ad.
---
**Pitch in $3 or whatever you can to help Democrats hold Republicans accountable.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523730/4067b0a/3cf946e65/7e6f45fd/61103515/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Elect-Democrats-2017-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170815_tp_nd&source=em_20170815_tp_nd")**

Derek --

After 49 Senate Republicans voted to take our health care away, we pledged to hold them accountable. Now, we're taking action against our first target: Nevada Sen. Dean Heller.

**[We launched new ads to make sure Nevadans know how Dean Heller betrayed them. Take a look -- they were outside Heller's office yesterday and are on interstates around Las Vegas this week -- and then pitch in to help us keep turning the screws.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523730/4067b0a/3cf946e65/7e6f45fa/61103515/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/Elect-Democrats-2017-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+We+launched+new+ads+to+make+sure+Nevadan&utm_campaign=em_20170815_tp_nd&source=em_20170815_tp_nd")**

[](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523730/4067b0a/3cf946e65/7e6f45fb/61103515/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/Elect-Democrats-2017-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=em_20170815_tp_nd&source=em_20170815_tp_nd")
Dean Heller knew repeal would be a disaster, and he promised Nevadans he'd oppose it.

But he went back on his word, casting the deciding vote in the Senate to move forward with repeal, and then collected his reward -- a promise from a super PAC linked to Mitch McConnell to spend $1 million to defend him.

So when Dean Heller steps outside of his office, we'll make sure he knows we won't let him get away with choosing Donald Trump over the people of Nevada.

This is just the start of how we're holding Heller and his fellow Republicans accountable for voting to take our health care away. Chip in $3 or more to make sure we can give it all we've got to fight back.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523730/4067b0a/3cf946e65/7e6f45f8/61103515/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-democrats-2017?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170815_tp_nd&source=em_20170815_tp_nd")

** Thanks,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523730/4067b0a/3cf946e65/7e6f4580/61103515/VEsHBw/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170815_tp_nd&source=em_20170815_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523730/4067b0a/3cf946e65/7e6f4581/61103515/VEsHBg/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170815_tp_nd&source=em_20170815_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.
clean_body: We have a new ad. Pitch in $3 or whatever you can to help Democrats hold Republicans accountable. "" Derek -- After 49 Senate Republicans voted to take our health care away, we pledged to hold them accountable. Now, we're taking action against our first target: Nevada Sen. Dean Heller. "" "" Dean Heller knew repeal would be a disaster, and he promised Nevadans he'd oppose it. But he went back on his word, casting the deciding vote in the Senate to move forward with repeal, and then collected his reward -- a promise from a super PAC linked to Mitch McConnell to spend $1 million to defend him. So when Dean Heller steps outside of his office, we'll make sure he knows we won't let him get away with choosing Donald Trump over the people of Nevada. This is just the start of how we're holding Heller and his fellow Republicans accountable for voting to take our health care away. Chip in $3 or more to make sure we can give it all we've got to fight back. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" "" "" Thanks, Tom Tom Perez Chair Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

name: Grassroots Action Alert (via FlaDems.com)
subject: need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
Team,

This is BIG. Our mid-month deadline is here, and we need $5,000 by midnight tomorrow to stay on track for next month's special election.

We've managed to fight back against Trump and Rick Scott's agenda so far this summer. But Washington Republicans are getting ready to flood the state to stop our nominee, Annette Taddeo, from flipping a red seat blue.

**[Can you pitch in $10 now to keep our momentum going?](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-special-election-fund?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+pitch+in+ask+now+to+keep+our+mom&utm_campaign=em081517&source=em081517&refcode=em081517")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. Otherwise, you will be redirected to a donation page._

**************[Donate $10 now](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bdb8/1a5213b3/70b89c4c/718b6b5c/2368464179/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-special-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=em081517&source=em081517&refcode=em081517")****** ********[Donate $25 now](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bdb8/1a5213b3/70b89c4c/718b6b5f/2368464179/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-special-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=em081517&source=em081517&refcode=em081517")******

******[Donate $50 now](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bdb8/1a5213b3/70b89c4c/718b6b5e/2368464179/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-special-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=em081517&source=em081517&refcode=em081517")******

******[Other amount](http://act.floridadems. name: Donnelly for Indiana
subject: CNN: Joe third most likely to lose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|
---
[](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c271b/7377f838/376130c0/51fbd1cc/129357431/VEsH/ "http://www.joeforindiana.com/")

| | **CNN: Indiana Senate Seat _Third Most Likely_ to Flip in 2018
[Help keep Joe in the Senate! Chip in $5 now >>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c271b/7377f838/376130c0/51fbd1cf/129357431/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-cnn?refcode=20170815nda&amount=10")** Peter -- CNN just named Joe the **_third most_ vulnerable senator up for re-election this cycle**. Republicans are already pouring money into Indiana to attack Joe, and this news will grab the attention of even more GOP mega donors.

**Look, nobody works harder for Hoosiers than Joe.** With your support, he played a crucial role in blocking Trumpcare, defended our public education from budget cuts, advocated for our servicemembers and veterans, and fought to fund programs to get Hoosiers back to work.

**But here 's the thing: Big-money special interest groups don't care about what he's doing for Hoosiers.** They just care about having a rubber stamp in Joe's seat -- and when they see that CNN says he's vulnerable, it means they can feel even more confident about throwing more money into his race.

Joe's race will be competitive and expensive, Peter. Every dollar will count -- from now until Election Day. **[Can you pitch in $5 so we can fight every step of the way to keep Joe in the Senate?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c271b/7377f838/376130c0/51fbd1cf/129357431/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-cnn?refcode=20170815nda&amount=10")**

\-- Donnelly for Indiana | ****[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c271b/7377f838/376130c0/51fbd1ce/129357431/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-cnn?refcode=20170815nda&amount=25")****
---

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Our common responsibility
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
History will remember those who fought for freedom, peace, and justice.

| Friend, Once again we find ourselves confronting an emboldened, racist minority. And once again we all have a responsibility to act. When we see hatred, we must speak up. When bigots march in our communities, we must stand united in opposition. When racism is stoked for political gain, it's on all of us to denounce and decry the hate. I hope history won't remember the cowards with torches this weekend, but instead shines with the light of those who joined together for freedom, peace, and justice -- people like Heather Heyer. Our lowest common denominator will not prevail, not in the United States of America. This must be a moment where we reaffirm a core commitment: We will never ignore an attack on our people. We will not tolerate hate in any form from Charlottesville to Seattle, and we will not allow white nationalists to feel emboldened by the administration in D.C. Instead we'll make our common progressive values -- inclusion, justice, and compassion -- ring from sea to sea. We've got a lot of work ahead of us. And we'll do it together. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://www.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?m=11702955&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&j=MTIyMTM2ODk5MgS2&l=6586026&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
---
All content (C) Jay Inslee for Washington, All Rights Reserved
PO Box 21067, Seattle, WA 98111
[Privacy Policy](http://www.jayinslee.com/privacy)

name: Team DSCC
subject: The 10 Democratic women senators who need your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Ten of our amazing Democratic Senate women are up for re-election in 2018, and each one of them needs our help.
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018?refcode=DPE-20170815-TeamDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Team --

Ten of our amazing female Democratic Senators are up for re-election in 2018, and each one of them needs our help to launch strong campaigns.

[**Nearly HALF the women of the Senate face re-election next year. Chip in $1 now to help them launch strong, tough campaigns.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018?refcode=DPE-20170815-TeamDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

The list of Democratic women up for re-election includes:

* Elizabeth Warren, who won't stop fearlessly calling out the Trump administration, no matter how hard Mitch McConnell tries to silence her,
* Mazie Hirono, who bravely returned from treatment for Stage 4 kidney cancer to cast her vote to save health care coverage for millions of Americans, and
* Kirsten Gillibrand, who has boldly stood up to Trump's Cabinet nominees and resisted his disastrous policies.

We know that our Democratic women will face uniquely vicious attacks, and shady right-wing super PACs are already running harsh ads against them. We need to help them launch strong campaigns now that can withstand the tough fights ahead.

All ten of the female Democratic Senators up for re-election are leading the charge to resist Trump's reckless agenda and it's essential we make sure every single one of them returns to the Senate next year.

**Chip in $1 now to the 2018 Women 's Senate Network to keep all of our Democratic women in the Senate fighting for us:

[http://www.dscc.org/re-elect-our-senate-women](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018?refcode=DPE-20170815-TeamDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thanks,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d971/2b07114c/d37feff/73125e3b/1233765212/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d971/2b07114c/d37feff/73125e3a/1233765212/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d971/2b07114c/d37feff/73125e35/1233765212/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: DWS
subject: Unite Against Hate
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friend,

What happened in Charlottesville, Virginia was a tragedy and an act of domestic terrorism. There is no other way to put it. The hatred that was on display has no place in our society, in our democracy, or in our country. We cannot remain silent. [_**Add your name if you agree.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e24/622b7b5b/500c6c4/307bdc06/979972015/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e170815")

President Donald Trump could have used the office of the president to disavow white nationalists who have felt empowered under his leadership from the start. He could have singled out white supremacists and told them that their hatred has no place in our country, but he waited two days. Initially, he declared a false equivalency by condeming the "violence on many sides."

There was only one side -- the one holding torches and screaming racial epithets that led to three Americans losing their lives. President Trump finally recognized the role that white supremacists and neo-Nazis had in the deadly violence, but the damage his lack of conviction caused in those first hours is already done.

We owe it to Heather Heyer, H. Jay Cullen, Berke M. M. Bates, and the dozens who were injured to call out white supremacy, anti-Semitism, and domestic terrorism. We must stand up against intolerance and bigotry.

**Let 's unite against hate and stand in solidarity with Charlottesville. [_Add your voice to mine and denounce hate._](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e24/622b7b5b/500c6c4/307bdc06/979972015/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e170815")**

Thank you,

Debbie |
Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e24/622b7b5b/500c6c4/307bdc39/979972015/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe
---

name: Tom Perez
subject: Rise and organize
body:
We will not lose hope. We will not give in to fear.
---
Derek --

Today, for the second time, Donald Trump used every excuse in the book to avoid having to call racists racist. Instead, he praised the alt-right, white supremacists, and neo-Nazis. He stood shoulder-to-shoulder with them and endorsed their cause.

It is sickening, and I know that, for many of us, it is frightening.

But we will not lose hope. We will not give in to fear. We will rise above Donald Trump's hatred, and we will organize to defeat him.

**Make sure Trump knows that you will never back down:**

**[ I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Rise-and-Organize1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170815_tp2_f&source=em_20170815_tp2_f")
** Thank you,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052374b/4067b0a/3cebc6d72/7e6f4cd7/2691413907/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170815_tp2_f&source=em_20170815_tp2_f"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052374b/4067b0a/3cebc6d72/7e6f4cd4/2691413907/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170815_tp2_f&source=em_20170815_tp2_f"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052374b/4067b0a/3cebc6d72/7e6f4cd5/2691413907/VEsC/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170815_tp2_f&source=em_20170815_tp2_f") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052374b/4067b0a/3cebc6d72/7e6f4cd2/2691413907/VEsD/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170815_tp2_f&source=em_20170815_tp2_f"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

We will rise above Donald Trump's hatred, and we will organize to defeat him. name: Andrew Gillum
subject: DACA
body:
#
Team --
Today marks the fifth anniversary of DACA, the program that allows Dreamers who came to the United States as children to have the opportunities to work and achieve their dreams in this country, even though they are undocumented.
Right now, over 100,000 Floridians rely on DACA benefits. That's why I'm calling on President Trump to ignore the naysayers and keep this crucial program in place until Congress acts in a bipartisan way to protect these young, aspiring Americans.
[**Watch our video on DACA, and then add your name to our petition demanding President Trump keep DACA in place >>**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32ad/9e00690/4cbcb5ce/24036f0b/1831945109/VEsH/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/daca?source=em170815-daca")
No human being should have to live in fear of deportation, especially when they are contributing to our communities in such meaningful ways -- through both their work and through demonstrating such tremendous courage and resilience. When I'm Governor, I'll work to protect these inspiring young people from deportation and ensure that they have the opportunity to achieve their dreams.
It is only through the strength of our diversity that Florida has become an international tourist destination and a hub for innovation and creativity. We cannot allow intolerance to take away what makes our state's future brightest -- our young people.
[**Join me today in supporting our Dreamers by adding your name, right here and right now.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32ad/9e00690/4cbcb5ce/24036f0b/1831945109/VEsE/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/daca?source=em170815-daca")
Together, we're going to rebuild this state into one that works for all of us.
Bring it home,
Andrew

**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32ad/9e00690/4cbcb5ce/24036f0a/1831945109/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-august2017?refcode=em20170815-daca")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32ad/9e00690/4cbcb5ce/24036f0d/1831945109/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32ad/9e00690/4cbcb5ce/24036f0c/1831945109/VEsD/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32ad/9e00690/4cbcb5ce/24036f0f/1831945109/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")
